title: geum × sanguineum
intro: Geum × sanguineum, also known as the bloody cranesbill or the red avens, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Geum × sanguineum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Geum × sanguineum is often prepared as a tincture or an infusion, and has been traditionally used in herbal preparations to support overall health and well-being.
